Agent Policy Overview | https://totem.ing/concepts/agent-policy-overview | How the QVAC → agent-policy → Totem → Minima execution model works, and why it makes the SDK AI-ready without giving up key control.
WOTS Key Management | https://totem.ing/concepts/wots-key-management | How the Totem SDK manages quantum-resistant one-time signing keys across addresses.
Omnia Payment Channels | https://totem.ing/concepts/omnia-channels | How Omnia Layer 2 eltoo channels work in the Totem SDK.
Omnia VTXO — Virtual UTXO Claim Layer | https://totem.ing/concepts/omnia-vtxo | How the @totemsdk/omnia-vtxo package provides cash-like off-chain balances backed by Merkle commitment trees.
Relay Modes | https://totem.ing/concepts/relay-modes | Choose between native Hyperswarm P2P, Axia-hosted relay, and self-hosted relay in @totemsdk/omnia-hyperswarm.
Totem Connect (dApp Provider) | https://totem.ing/concepts/totem-connect | How dApps connect to the Totem wallet extension using @totemsdk/connect.
TESSA Pay | https://totem.ing/guides/tessa-pay | Edge-native merchant POS with policy-controlled payments and auto-approve rules on Minima.
Totem Personal Node | https://totem.ing/guides/totem-personal-node | Always-on personal node for multi-device coordination with shared WOTS lease strategy.
KISSVM Studio | https://totem.ing/guides/kissvm-studio | Local developer IDE for writing and simulating KISSVM scripts with a policy safety linter.
Statechain Pass | https://totem.ing/guides/statechain-pass | Transferable off-chain ownership of tickets, vouchers, and access rights with policy-enforced provenance.
Omnia Pocket | https://totem.ing/guides/omnia-pocket | Mobile/Pear off-chain payment-channel wallet with policy guards on channel size, auto-pay limits, and settlement triggers.
Channel Factory Wallet | https://totem.ing/guides/channel-factory-wallet | Group N-of-N factory channels with policy-defined roles, virtual channel limits, and emergency-close rules.
Omnia Router Node | https://totem.ing/guides/omnia-router-node | Liquidity and payment-routing node with policy-controlled accepted routes, fee floors, and cross-token swap rules.
Totem Community Node | https://totem.ing/guides/totem-community-node | Finance infrastructure for cooperatives, schools, and markets with policy templates for merchant limits, relay permissions, and child-account rules.
MachinePay Edge | https://totem.ing/guides/machinepay-edge | Pay-per-use device gateway for Wi-Fi, solar, compute, and bandwidth with policy-enforced min price and auto-shutdown.

#### Parameters

> **inputSchema**: `object`

***

### maxCallsPerMinute?

AppPermission | https://totem.ing/api/totemsdk-manifest/type-aliases/AppPermission | AppPermission

# Type Alias: AppPermission

> **AppPermission** = `"wallet:read-balance"` \| `"wallet:request-payment"` \| `"omnia:open-channel"` \| `"omnia:update-channel"` \| `"lookup:watch-address"` \| `"kissvm:evaluate"` \| `"qvac:call-agent"`

@totemsdk/manifest — Manifest type definitions

Four manifest categories for the MVP:
  AppManifest        — human-facing Pear app
  CapabilityManifest — ephemeral AI/agent service
  DAppManifest       — KISSVM contract / covenant
  EdgeServiceManifest — any persistent Totem Edge service

No network, no blockchain, no Hyperswarm — pure schema.
EdgeServiceType | https://totem.ing/api/totemsdk-manifest/type-aliases/EdgeServiceType | EdgeServiceType

# Class: BareFileStore

@totemsdk/pear — KVStore interface

Structurally identical to `StorageAdapter` from `@totemsdk/core` so that
both `BareKVStore` and `BareFileStore` can be passed directly to
`LocalLeaseProvider`, `WotsWatermarkStore`, and `lookup-client` storage slots
without any adapter glue.

constants.

TX_POW_MIN_DIFFICULTY | https://totem.ing/api/totemsdk-txpow/variables/TX_POW_MIN_DIFFICULTY | TX\_POW\_MIN\_DIFFICULTY

# Variable: TX\_POW\_MIN\_DIFFICULTY

> `const` **TX\_POW\_MIN\_DIFFICULTY**: `Uint8Array`

TX_POW_MIN_DIFFICULTY = floor((2^256 - 1) / 1_000_000)

This is the hardcoded floor constant matching Magic.
